items.title: DoE Deletes Webpage Instructing People To Lower Thermostat to 78
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Pope urges Europe to do more for migrants while visiting gateway island
items.dek: The pontiff pays tribute to migrants who lost their lives at sea at a cemetery on the Italian island of Lampedusa.
items.body: The pontiff pays tribute to migrants who lost their lives at sea at a cemetery on the Italian island of Lampedusa.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Large crowds gather in Tehran on first day of Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral
items.dek: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla until Monday, before travelling across Iran and Iraq.
items.body: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla until Monday, before travelling across Iran and Iraq.
items.author: IriLine Desk
